channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree needs to be trimmed, 5th May
item.description:
The trees on this road get pruned but this particular one never seems to get done, the sap and flowers from the tree are damaging my cars and I would like to request this tree to be pruned so that it is no longer causing damage to my car paintwork
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked blocking driveway access, 5th May
item.description:
Car has been left outside my house and is blocking access to my driveway. This is a dropped kerb and the car has been left since 01/05/26

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): East Crescent, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole, 5th May
item.description:
Dangerous LARGE pot hole At Risk of causing accidents due to drivers trying to avoid Unacceptable after all these months and when funding is allocated
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wet partly full paint pot abandoned on road, 5th May
item.description:
Wet partly full paint pot abandoned on road. Car tyre marks now on road and likely to cause more incidents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Conifer Gardens, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous pot holes, 5th May
item.description:
A series of several potholes along this stretch of road at risk of causing accidents as drivers swerve to avoid these LARGE pot holes. Unacceptable when this has been months and funding has been issued from government to address this. Very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cabinet left on pavement, 5th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped this my tree on pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Catherine Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped outside 22 Evergreen Square E8, 5th May
item.description:
Please please please come and collect these items. There is a Mattress, a Carpet, other wooden items, and I’m sure by the morning there will be more items dumped! This is a serious health and Safety snd fire Hazard. Nothing gets done!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 5th May
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parsonage Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Litter in planted area, 5th May
item.description:
There is always lots of litter/rubbish in the planted areas here and in the neighbourhood. It seems to get missed on regular street cleans/litter picks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Railton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaking water fountain, 5th May
item.description:
Leak from water fountain spout

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2m long pothole in Halfway Street o/s 99, 5th May
item.description:
The pothole was reported on 10 March as three separate defects. These have now joined up and become deeper to form one huge pothole with a raised patch in the centre. It is now 2m long and needs a permanent repair as a matter of urgency. A cyclist or motorbiker is going to have a serious accident otherwise.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Halfway Street, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No parking permit, 5th May
item.description:
No parking permit to use space

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warneford Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste, 5th May
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped in woodland area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rowton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canisters, 5th May
item.description:
Box of nitrous oxide canisters dumped in layby
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dumbreck Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wasp nest, 5th May
item.description:
There is a wasp nest on the tree branch. This is quite alarming as behind these houses is a primary school that has a entrance behind the houses on Sevenoaks way so many children walk down Walsingham Road. Multiple times a day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Walsingham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: MOT expired, not allowed on public road, 5th May
item.description:
Further to my complaint. Thanks for confirming they have a parking permit and are taxed, however this vehicle is NOT MOT’d, as of the 23rd April it expired. Therefore it is illegal for it to be parked on the road. It needs to be in a garage or driveway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belsham Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 5th May
item.description:
Bed base on pavement been dumped so no prams wheel chairs etc can get through on pavement so have to go in road. Also dumped garden rubbish in road and kids jumping in bags and pulling in middle of road which is so dangerous as on road so needs to be picked up urgently before an accident is gonna happen.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hampstead Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th May
item.description:
Mattress and headboard leaning against tree next to 10 Andwell Close. I reported this on 30th April. It is classed as "fixed", but the rubbish is still there.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mountjoy Close, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barry Road Upland Road Bus Stop, 5th May
item.description:
Please can the weeds be cleared on the bus stop on Barry Road and also on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty street, 5th May
item.description:
Street and paths in the whole of Tenterden close need cleaning and trees pruned.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tenterden Close, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
